languages.text: "Я озадаче{mf|н|на} происходящим не менее вашего. Но для того, чтобы найти ответы, мне нужно попасть внутрь".

traits.locale_text: [Драфт] заявить, что вы озадачены своим положением не меньше сержанта и будете рады прояснить это внутри

languages.text: "I am as perplexed as you by what is going on. But in order to find answers, I must go inside."
languages.original_text: "Я озадаче{mf|н|на} происходящим не менее вашего. Но для того, чтобы найти ответы, мне нужно попасть внутрь".

traits.locale_text: "I am as perplexed as you by what is going on. But in order to find answers, I must go inside."
"I am as perplexed as you by what is going on. But in order to find answers, I must go inside."
"I am as perplexed as you by what is going on. But in order to find answers, I must go inside."

languages.text: “我跟你一样搞不清现在是怎么回事。但要想找到答案，我必须进去。”
languages.original_text: "I am as perplexed as you by what is going on. But in order to find answers, I must go inside."

traits.locale_text: “我跟你一样搞不清现在是怎么回事。但要想找到答案，我必须进去。”

languages.text: « Cette situation me laisse aussi perplexe que vous, mais si je veux trouver des réponses, je dois entrer. »
languages.original_text: "I am as perplexed as you by what is going on. But in order to find answers, I must go inside."

traits.locale_text: « Cette situation me laisse aussi perplexe que vous, mais si je veux trouver des réponses, je dois entrer. »

languages.text: "Neler olup bittiği konusunda ben de epey şaşkınım. Fakat cevapları bulmak için içeri girmeliyim."
languages.original_text: "I am as perplexed as you by what is going on. But in order to find answers, I must go inside."

traits.locale_text: "Neler olup bittiği konusunda ben de epey şaşkınım. Fakat cevapları bulmak için içeri girmeliyim."

languages.text: «Estoy tan perplej{mf|o|a} como usted, pero para sacar algo en claro debo entrar».
languages.original_text: "I am as perplexed as you by what is going on. But in order to find answers, I must go inside."

traits.locale_text: «Estoy tan perplej{mf|o|a} como usted, pero para sacar algo en claro debo entrar».

languages.text: "Ich bin ob der Geschehnisse ebenso perplex wie Ihr. Aber um Antworten zu finden, muss ich hinein."
languages.original_text: "I am as perplexed as you by what is going on. But in order to find answers, I must go inside."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin ob der Geschehnisse ebenso perplex wie Ihr. Aber um Antworten zu finden, muss ich hinein."

languages.text: 「何が起きているのか、あなたと同じく困惑しています。でも、答えを見つけるために、私は中に入らなければなりません。」
languages.original_text: "I am as perplexed as you by what is going on. But in order to find answers, I must go inside."

traits.locale_text: 「何が起きているのか、あなたと同じく困惑しています。でも、答えを見つけるために、私は中に入らなければなりません。」
